title: Muthukku Muthaaga Song Lyrics Anbu Sagodharargal
stanzas:
Muthukku muthaaga
sothukku sothaaga
annan thambi pirandhu
vandhom kannukku kannaaga
anbaale inaindhu vandhom
onnukkul onnaaga (2)

thaaiyaarum padithathillai
thandhai mugam paarthadhillai
thalaattum kaetathandri
orpaattum arindhadhillai

Muthukku muthaaga
sothukku sothaaga
annan thambi pirandhu
vandhom kannukku kannaaga
anbaale inaindhu vandhom
onnukkul onnaaga

annan sollum vaarthai ellaam
vedham enum thambi ullam(2)

annai ena vandha ullam
dheivam ena kaaval kollum(2)

chinna thambi kadaisi thambi
sellamaai valarndha pillai(2)

ondru patta idhayathile
orunaalum pirivu illai
Muthukku muthaaga
sothukku sothaaga
annan thambi pirandhu
vandhom kannukku kannaaga
anbaale inaindhu vandhom
onnukkul onnaaga

Rajakkal maaligaiyum
kaanaatha inbamadaa
naalukaal mandabam pol
naangal konda sondhamadaa

Muthukku muthaaga
sothukku sothaaga
annan thambi pirandhu
vandhom kannukku kannaaga
anbaale inaindhu vandhom
onnukkul onnaaga

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Muthukku Muthaaga?

The song conveys themes of love and familial relationships, emphasizing the bonds between siblings and the warmth of togetherness.

In which movie does Muthukku Muthaaga appear?

This song is featured in the movie Anbu Sagodharargal, which explores themes of brotherhood and love.

Who is the singer of Muthukku Muthaaga?

The singer for this song is currently unknown, as the details are not available.

What year was Muthukku Muthaaga released?

The song was released in the year 1973.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the film Anbu Sagodharargal, the song Muthukku Muthaaga beautifully illustrates the deep emotional connections between siblings. The lyrics reflect a sense of nostalgia and warmth, evoking feelings of love and togetherness. This classic melody resonates with listeners, reminding them of the importance of family bonds. Its timeless appeal continues to touch hearts, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Muthukku Muthaaga is a timeless melody that resonates with the heart, capturing the essence of familial bonds and love. This enchanting song from the classic film Anbu Sagodharargal evokes a sense of nostalgia, making it a cherished piece in Tamil music history. Experience the soulful lyrics and captivating tune that have left a lasting impact on listeners over the decades.
stanzaMeanings: We have come into this world as brothers, born to each other, and we have come together as one, united in our eyes.
Neither mother nor father has taught us, we have not seen our father's face, and we have not heard the lullabies or understood the teachings.
He has come as a scholar, growing up like a treasure, my brother.
In this age of youth, I live trusting him.
We have come into this world as brothers, born to each other, and we have come together as one, united in our eyes.
Every word spoken by my brother is like a scripture to my heart.
When mother comes, the heart feels like a god protecting us.
The younger brother, the last born, has grown up without any complaints.
In one heart, there is no separation at all. We have come into this world as brothers, born to each other, and we have come together as one, united in our eyes.
We do not see the palaces of kings, we are like a joyful gathering, like a celebration.
Like the petals of a rose, we are inseparable.
In a hundred years, we will not change, we are like a bond that lasts forever.
We have come into this world as brothers, born to each other, and we have come together as one, united in our eyes.
